Add a raid item , risk in delay of signing the SOW and issual of PO. The impact - the cloud team will not spin off the environment and the offshore team will not be onboarded to start the project. There will be delays to the final golive and cut off dates

**Project Risk Assessment**

A new risk item has been identified and added to the project:

* **Risk Item:** Delay in signing the SOW (Statement of Work) and issuance of PO (Purchase Order)
* **Risk Description:** The project is at risk of delay due to the pending signing of the SOW and issuance of PO. This delay will have a cascading effect on the project timeline.
* **Impact:**
	+ The cloud team will not be able to spin off the environment, resulting in a delay in setting up the project infrastructure.
	+ The offshore team will not be onboarded, which will hinder the project's progress and delay the start of work.
	+ The final go-live and cut-off dates will be impacted, resulting in an overall delay to the project completion.
* **Mitigation Plan:** Expedite the signing of the SOW and issuance of PO to prevent delays. Regular follow-ups with the stakeholders and contract team to ensure timely completion of these tasks.

**Updated Project Status:**

* Project Code: boston-001
* Opportunity ID: O-1932849 (Active)
* Risk Item: Delay in signing SOW and issuance of PO (High)

Please note that the project timeline and milestones will be revised once the SOW is signed and PO is issued. Regular updates will be provided to ensure all stakeholders are informed of the project's progress.
was the above added to RAID table
I do not see any entry in the RAIDsummary table

Add a raid item for boston project -  risk of delay in project kick off and onboarding. The reason is the SOW is not signed by customer. The customer has indicated there will be delay of two weeks to issue the signed PO

**RAID Log Entry**

* **Project Code:** boston-001
* **RAID Type:** R (Risk)
* **Risk Description:** Delay in project kick-off and onboarding due to unsigned SOW and delayed PO issuance
* **Reason:** The SOW is not signed by the customer, and the customer has indicated a delay of two weeks to issue the signed PO
* **Impact:** Delay in project kick-off, onboarding of offshore team, and spin-off of cloud environment, ultimately affecting the final go-live and cut-off dates
* **Mitigation Plan:** Follow up with the customer to expedite the signing of the SOW and issuance of PO. Explore alternative options to initiate project kick-off activities that do not require a signed SOW or PO.

**RAID Log Table:**

| Project Code | RAID Type | Description | Reason | Impact | Mitigation Plan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| boston-001 | R | Delay in project kick-off and onboarding | Unsigned SOW and delayed PO issuance | Delay in project kick-off, onboarding, and go-live | Follow up with customer, explore alternative options |

**Updated RAID Summary:**

The RAID log entry has been added to the RAID summary table, highlighting the risk of delay in project kick-off and onboarding for the Boston project. The mitigation plan is in place to minimize the impact of this risk.
For the delay in signng the SOW and issuing of PO the customer has indicated it will take another 4 weeks.

**RAID Log Update**

* **Project Code:** boston-001
* **RAID Type:** R (Risk)
* **Risk Description:** Delay in project kick-off and onboarding due to unsigned SOW and delayed PO issuance
* **Reason:** The customer has indicated that it will take an additional 4 weeks to sign the SOW and issue the PO, resulting in a total delay of 6 weeks
* **Impact:** Delay in project kick-off, onboarding of offshore team, and spin-off of cloud environment, ultimately affecting the final go-live and cut-off dates
* **Mitigation Plan:** Review and update the project schedule to reflect the new delay. Explore alternative options to initiate project kick-off activities that do not require a signed SOW or PO. Consider discussing the impact of the delay with the customer and exploring options to accelerate the SOW and PO process.

**RAID Log Table:**

| Project Code | RAID Type | Description | Reason | Impact | Mitigation Plan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| boston-001 | R | Delay in project kick-off and onboarding | Unsigned SOW and delayed PO issuance | Delay in project kick-off, onboarding, and go-live | Review and update project schedule, explore alternative options, discuss with customer |

**Updated RAID Summary:**

The RAID log entry has been updated to reflect the new delay of 6 weeks. The mitigation plan has been revised to reflect the need to review and update the project schedule, explore alternative options, and discuss the impact with the customer.

**Risk Status:**

* **Risk Name:** Delay in signing SOW and issuing PO
* **Risk Status:** High
* **Risk Probability:** High
* **Risk Impact:** High
* **Risk Mitigation:** In progress

The risk status has been updated to reflect the high probability and impact of the risk, and the mitigation plan is in progress.
